userIntent: Prepare a read-only GitHub handoff report.

confidence.reason: Local Git metadata and changed-file summary were collected without mutation.

commands.outputSummary: Reported branch state, HEAD, tags at HEAD, remote names, and changed-file summary without printing remote URLs.

skippedChecks.name: GitHub API state
skippedChecks.reason: The skill is local and read-only.
skippedChecks.consequence: PR, CI, and review state are not verified.

risks.summary: Remote PR and CI state were not checked.
evidence: GitHub API access was not used

changedState.summary: No project, Git, GitHub, dependency, runtime, service, or remote state changed.

handoffSummary: Local Git handoff evidence is available; GitHub remote state remains unverified.
recommendedNextAction: Review the handoff report before approving any GitHub mutation.
